microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized, self-service system—standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution from manual coordination to a scalable, developer-friendly model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability—**shipped a rack-level drill program in 4 months** with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard adopted across enterprise infrastructure teams.

Built and deployed an **internal AI agent** for drill planning, restructuring end-to-end workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%—using AI tooling daily to prototype, iterate, and ship faster.

Directed 14 high-stakes cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, partnering directly with field engineering and customer teams.
microsoft_2023: Championed **AI-driven code generation** adoption across Azure engineering—running hands-on demos and discovery sessions that drove utilization across 14 developer teams and saved 37 engineering hours monthly by reducing repetitive workflow overhead.

Shaped the product roadmap to include **intent-based YAML generation** by conducting 11+ structured user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and translating raw developer feedback into scoped, actionable requirements.

Improved developer tooling by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform and enforcing rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and demonstrating how instrumentation and feedback loops reveal whether shipped features are working.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework, generating $3M in accelerated revenue and launching Azure regions 28% faster by cutting manual coordination from the critical path.

Ran deep **customer discovery with 20+ service teams** to identify 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths—scoping what to build, what to cut, and in what order to maximize developer velocity.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the instrumentation and metrics needed to target automation gaps and prioritize the highest-leverage infrastructure investments.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **legacy OS migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit pilot—mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and owning execution end-to-end to achieve zero operational downtime, partnering with IT and Engineering to sequence rollout safely.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing the friction developers experienced during the intake and release process.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and owned backlog prioritization—resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process by triaging paper cuts that were eroding team trust and shipping velocity.
pro_painters: Executed a **digital-first go-to-market strategy**—optimizing the website and Google profile to reduce Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and boost conversions by 2.7%, owning GTM rollout and feedback loops from launch through iteration.

Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process, streamlining operations and eliminating manual bottlenecks that slowed deal velocity.

Conducted financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify and close margin leaks, delivering pricing model recommendations that improved leadership's ability to make high-leverage, data-backed decisions.
